title: Atul Projects is Hiring: Senior Property Advisor (Junior)

jsonLd.title: Atul Projects is Hiring: Senior Property Advisor (Junior)
jsonLd.description:
Atul Projects has an exciting opening for a Senior Property Advisor at our Vijayawada office. Join a company that values innovation, collaboration, and continuous learning.

About Atul Projects:
Atul Projects is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Prepare presentations and proposals for institutional clients
• Maintain a pipeline of qualified leads using CRM software
• Negotiate pricing, terms, and conditions on behalf of clients
• Liaise with banks and NBFCs for home loan assistance to customers
• Source and close property deals with prospective buyers and investors
• Coordinate with legal teams for documentation and title verification
• Manage relationships with existing customers post-purchase

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Sc / M.Sc in Life Sciences
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in MS Office
• Proficiency in Due Diligence
• Proficiency in Negotiation Skills
• Proficiency in CRM Software
• Proficiency in Title Search
• Proficiency in Contract Management
• Proficiency in Financial Modeling
• Proficiency in Lease Administration

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Flexible working hours
• Recognition and rewards programs
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Vijayawada, Andhra Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Atul Projects!
